scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.docker:prod:up:monitor: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.prod.yml -f docker-compose.monitoring.yml --env-file .env.production up -d
scripts.docker:prod:up:images: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.prod.yml -f docker-compose.prod.images.yml --env-file .env.production up -d
scripts.docker:prod:up:images:monitor: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.prod.yml -f docker-compose.prod.images.yml -f docker-compose.monitoring.yml --env-file .env.production up -d
scripts.docker:prod:up:images:no-monitor: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.prod.yml -f docker-compose.prod.images.yml --env-file .env.production up -d
scripts.docker:prod:seed: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.prod.yml -f docker-compose.prod.images.yml --env-file .env.production exec backend node dist/prisma/seed-dev.js
scripts.docker:prod:down:monitor: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.prod.yml -f docker-compose.monitoring.yml --env-file .env.production down
scripts.docker:prod:down:images: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.prod.yml -f docker-compose.prod.images.yml --env-file .env.production down
scripts.docker:prod:down:images:monitor: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.prod.yml -f docker-compose.prod.images.yml -f docker-compose.monitoring.yml --env-file .env.production down
scripts.docker:prod:down:images:no-monitor: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.prod.yml -f docker-compose.prod.images.yml --env-file .env.production down
